title: Soothing Scenes Backgrounds
description: This Resource Pack let’s you select between a few of the Official Soothing Scenes Videos as Main Menu Backgrounds.
body:
![IMPORTANT INFORMATION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b511ddb5b7d9decc01c16028e3061567579b4a.png)
- You have to select **ONE** of the Background Files that you want, they do not switch automatically.
- These backgrouds are **NOT** Animated!
- They should work on pretty much all Versions of Minecraft that have Menu Panoramas.



![Title Screens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/snEgWyzx/images/16f9786c2ede8aacac714e4a11e5232cf2190eec.png)
```
This Resource Pack let's you select between a few of the Soothing Scenes Videos seen on the Official Minecraft YouTube Channel.
```
